basic_details.job_title: RDWS Shivamogga Senior Microbiologist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate/M.Sc Microbiology, Postgraduate/M.Sc Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Environmental Science, Graduate/B.Sc Microbiology, Graduate/B.Sc Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Environmental Science
qualification.details: Senior Microbiologist: Postgraduate/M.Sc Microbiology with 3 years experience in the same field of testing; OR Postgraduate/M.Sc Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Environmental Science with 5 years experience in a similar field of testing; OR Graduate/B.Sc Microbiology with 5 years experience in the same field of testing; OR Graduate/B.Sc Biochemistry/Biotechnology/Environmental Science with 10 years experience in a similar field of testing.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on qualification and experience Interview
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 30-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RDWS Shivamogga to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the RDWS Shivamogga Senior Microbiologist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Senior Microbiologist post is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Microbiologist post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Postgraduate/M.Sc in Microbiology, Biochemistry, Biotechnology, or Environmental Science, or a Graduate/B.Sc in the same subjects, with varying years of experience depending on the degree level.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Microbiologist position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Microbiologist post is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Microbiologist role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 31,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Microbiologist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Senior Microbiologist position as per the notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates are required to apply online through the official website of RDWS Shivamogga.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the RDWS Shivamogga Senior Microbiologist recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Microbiologist role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their qualification and experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is KAVABHAM/GRAMANEETSAKKU/PB/C-2/VIVAR22/MBLAB/2026-27.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Senior Microbiologist is on a contractual basis.
